name: Research Data Visualization
description: Academic data plots with scaling curves, heatmaps, and benchmark comparisons.
template:
Create a {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Academic data visualization figure
- Soft literature palette: slate gray, muted navy, dusty teal, soft terracotta
- Clean log-scaled or linear axes with precise tick marks
- White background, thin gridlines, compact legends
- Readable axis labels, subtle shading for confidence bands
- No neon colors, no 3D effects, no decorative elements

Density control:
- 3-5 data series or visual elements
- Each series has clear analytical purpose
- Use whitespace for clarity
- One clear focal metric with supporting comparisons
